rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Respondents Caroline Ingeborn And Gustav Lindqvists Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: The motion for summary judgment is granted. Petitioner filed no opposition. Respondents Caroline Ingeborn and Gustav Lindqvist ("Respondents") presented uncontradicted evidence showing that they are bona fide purchasers, having paid valuable consideration in an arms-length transaction, having recorded their deed, and having shown that they did not conspire with the seller or know the property was subject to any adverse claim when they purchased it. The lis pendens filed prior to their purchase cannot be used to show constructive knowledge in light of Code of Civil Procedure sections 405.60 and 405.61 because it has been expunged. Therefore, Respondents are entitled to summary judgment on Petitioner's claims against them under Probate Code sections 850 and 859. Any party wishing to contest this tenatative ruling must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, January 22, 2020.
